 "data": "erDiagram
 USER ||--o| DRIVER : \"HAS DRIVER PROFILE\"
 USER ||--|{ REVIEW : \"WRITES\"
 USER ||--|{ FAVORITE : \"SAVES\"
 
 DRIVER ||--|{ VEHICLE : \"OWNS\"
 DRIVER ||--o| REVIEW : \"RECEIVES\"
 
 CITY ||--o{ HOTEL : \"CONTAINS\"
 CITY ||--o{ ATTRACTION : \"CONTAINS\"
 CITY ||--o{ RESTAURANT : \"CONTAINS\"
 CITY ||--o{ DRIVER : \"HAS\"
 
 HOTEL ||--o{ REVIEW : \"RECEIVES\"
 HOTEL ||--o{ FAVORITE : \"IS FAVORITE\"
 
 RESTAURANT ||--o{ FAVORITE : \"IS FAVORITE\"
 
 ATTRACTION ||--o{ REVIEW : \"RECEIVES\"
 ATTRACTION ||--o{ FAVORITE : \"IS FAVORITE\"

 USER {
 int id
 string first_name
 string last_name
 string email
 string phone
 string password
 string role
 string status
 boolean active
 }
 DRIVER {
 int id
 string license_number
 int years_of_experience
 string languages
 boolean available
 }
 VEHICLE {
 int id
 string brand
 string model
 int seats
 string registration_number
 boolean air_conditioning
 }
 CITY {
 int id
 string name
 string region
 string description
 }
 HOTEL {
 int id
 string name
 string address
 string phone
 string email
 string description
 int stars
 }
 RESTAURANT {
 int id
 string name
 string description
 string address
 string phone
 string cuisine
 string price_range
 }
 ATTRACTION {
 int id
 string name
 string description
 string address
 string opening_hours
 }
 REVIEW {
 int id
 int rating
 string comment
 }
 FAVORITE {
 int id
 }",
 "config": null
